text.title: GitHub Actions — Deployment Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Run decision tree on env count + automation completeness + metrics availability.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: model-environments
step.action: List envs, approvers, branch filters; set protection rules.

step.name: select-strategy
step.action: Pick canary vs blue-green; define rollout steps + rollback metric/threshold.

step.name: extract-reusable-workflow
step.action: Move deploy steps into reusable workflow; pin via version tag.

step.name: automate-release-validate
step.action: Wire release automation; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
